raw_consumer_statement: I was contacted by a company and engaged in a contract for services. After doing more research I determined that the arrangement was not to my benefit. I requested cancellation of the contract within the company 's timeframe. The company stated they would refund the money. I discovered no refund was completed and disputed the charge. Citibank told me to request a refund from the company. I again requested the refund. Multiple times the company, XXXX XXXX XXXX, assured they would refund the charge.
